title: Spanish Squid and Rice
description: A classic Spanish dish featuring squid, dark arroz, and a touch of negro, served with a delicate twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the squid and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until slightly browned.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the white wine and water, and bring to a boil.
Add the black arroz and negro, stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover and cook for 18-20 minutes, until the rice is tender.
Stir in the lemon juice, season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
